title: You gave me a u32. I gave you root. (io_uring ZCRX freelist LPE)
summary: This article details a Linux kernel local privilege escalation (LPE) exploit targeting the io_uring subsystem's zero-copy RX (ZCRX) feature. The vulnerability involves a freelist corruption bug triggered by a crafted u32 value, allowing an attacker to gain root access. It provides a deep technical analysis of the exploit chain.
